# QA Plan: Sprint 7 — Citizen Simulation
**Date**: 2026-06-17
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 8 stories across 3 systems (citizen-sim, street-view, UI)
**Engine**: React 19 + TypeScript + Three.js via @react-three/fiber
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-7.md
**GDD**: design/gdd/citizen-simulation.md (Status: In Review — blocking items resolved)

> **Note:** Story files 7-1 through 7-6 are not yet authored. Test paths listed
> below are the required targets — developers must create test files at exactly
> these paths before `/story-done` will pass. Back-fill `/qa-plan` QA Test Cases
> sections into story files after `/create-stories` authors them.

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 7-1: CitizenHandler P1 — Generation + Identity

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/citizens/citizen_generation.test.ts`
**Story type**: Logic (inferred)
**GDD reference**: citizen-simulation.md §3.1 (identity), edge case 11 (determinism)

**What to test**:

- **AC-1a**: `buildCitizenRoster(seed)` returns exactly 25 citizens with split
  **11 people / 7 army / 7 business** — count by faction, assert exact values.
- **AC-1b (seeded determinism)**: `seedRng(S)` → generate → compare all 25
  name/skin/faction entries; same seed → identical roster. Different seed (e.g., 1 vs 2)
  → different roster (probabilistically; use seeds known to yield distinct rosters).
- **AC-2 (immutable identity)**: generate a roster; simulate an adversarial round
  (`security=0, rel=-10, charisma=-10, education=0`); assert every citizen's
  `name`, `skin`, and `faction` are bit-identical to their initial values.
- `bodySeed` per citizen is drawn from `rollFloat()` (seeded cursor, not `Math.random()`)
  — assert it is in `[0, 1)` and stable across save/load reconstruction.
- **RNG source guard**: assert `buildCitizenRoster` calls `rollFloat` from
  `src/Utils/Math.ts` and not `Math.random()` inline.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Edge case 11 (save/load determinism): `seedRng(S)` → generate; save cursor state;
  `setRngState` cursor back to pre-generation position; regenerate → identical roster.
  Confirms `bodySeed` draws don't exhaust extra entropy unexpectedly.
- Seeds 0 and `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` both produce valid 25-citizen rosters
  (no index out-of-bounds in name/skin tables).

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests

---

### Story 7-2: CitizenHandler P2 — Employment + Happiness + Body-Type

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/citizens/citizen_employment_happiness.test.ts`
**Story type**: Logic (inferred)
**GDD reference**: citizen-simulation.md §4.1 (Happiness), §4.2 (Employment), §4.5 (Body-Type)

**What to test**:

**AC-3 (Marco pinned examples)**:
- R1: `sec=7, rel=+4, char=+2, faction=army, employed=true, lastRel=+4`
  → `factionFortune = (4/10)*3 + (7-5)/5 = 1.2 + 0.4 = 1.6`
  → `charismaTerm = (2/10)*2 = 0.4`, `displacement=0`, `volatility=0`
  → `happiness = clamp(5+1.6+0.4, 0, 10) = 7.0`
- R4: `sec=2, rel=-1, char=+2, faction=army, employed=false, lastRel=+4`
  → `factionFortune = (-1/10)*3 + (2-5)/5 = -0.3 + (-0.6) = -0.9`
  → `volatility = min(2, |-1 - 4| * 0.4) = min(2, 2.0) = 2.0`, `displacement=2`
  → `happiness = clamp(5 - 0.9 + 0.4 - 2 - 2, 0, 10) = 0.5`

**AC-4 (clamp at both ends)**:
- Max: `rel=+10, charisma=+10, sec=10, employed=true` → raw `11` → clamped to `10`
- Min (taxed people): `rel=-10, charisma=-10, health=0, peopleTax=50`
  → raw `5 - 4.5 - 2 = -1.5` → clamped to `0`
- Min (taxed business): `rel=-10, businessTax=50, infrastructure=0, charisma=-10`
  → raw `5 - 4.5 - 2 = -1.5` → clamped to `0`

**AC-5 (employment boundaries — all 7 cases explicit)**:
- Army employed: `security=4, rel=0` → `employed=true`
- Army displaced: `security=3, rel=+5` → `employed=false` (sec below threshold)
- Army displaced: `security=5, rel=-1` → `employed=false` (rel below threshold)
- Business employed: `rel=0, infrastructure=3` → `employed=true`
- Business displaced: `rel=-1, infrastructure=5` → `employed=false`
- Business displaced: `rel=+5, infrastructure=2` → `employed=false`
- People: any inputs → `employed=true` always

**AC-6 (elite recovery)**:
- R1: army `sec=7, rel=+3` → `employed=true, displacement=0`
- R2: `sec=2` (below threshold) → `employed=false, displacement=2`
- R3: `sec=5, rel=+1` → `employed=true, displacement=0` (penalties fully lift)

**AC-17 (body-type lerp at health=0 and health=10)**:
- `health=0`: `fatShare=0.05, slimShare=0.70, fitShare=0.25`
  - `bodySeed=0.03` → fat; `bodySeed=0.20` → fit (0.03≤0.20<0.30); `bodySeed=0.90` → slim
- `health=10`: `fatShare=0.40, slimShare=0.15, fitShare=0.45`
  - `bodySeed=0.03` → fat; `bodySeed=0.20` → fat (0.20<0.40); `bodySeed=0.90` → slim
- `bodySeed=0.20` changes from `fit` → `fat` as health improves (the threshold cross case)

**AC-18 (round-1 volatility = 0)**:
- High-relation case: `rel=+10, lastRel=+10` → `volatility=0`
- Negative-relation case: `rel=-8, lastRel=-8` → `volatility=0`
- Both assert no phantom whiplash on round 1

**AC-19 (three-round elite recovery arc)**:
- Extend AC-6 with happiness values: R1 employed → healthy happiness; R2 displaced
  → lower happiness (displacement penalty); R3 re-employed → displacement lifts,
  happiness recovers

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `lastRel` crosses sign boundary: `prevRel=+5, rel=-5`
  → `volatility = min(2, 10 * 0.4) = min(2, 4) = 2` (capped at 2)
- Tax threshold tests: both `peopleTax=30` (no penalty) and `peopleTax=31` (−0.5);
  both `businessTax=45` (no penalty) and `businessTax=46` (−0.5)

**Estimated test count**: ~18 unit tests

---

### Story 7-3: CitizenHandler P3 — Role Fork + Death + Feedback + nextRound()

**Test file path**: `tests/integration/citizens/citizen_resolution.test.ts`
**Story type**: Integration (inferred)
**GDD reference**: citizen-simulation.md §4.3 (Role fork), §4.4 (Death), §4.6 (Feedback), §4.8 (Population)
**RNG mock pattern**: mock `rollChance` from `src/Utils/Math.ts`
  (same technique as `EffectHandler.test.ts` and `ActionHandler.test.ts`)

**What to test**:

*Role fork — AC-7a, 7b, 8, 20:*

- **AC-7a (band boundaries, gone mocked false)**:
  - `h=6.0` → `content`; `h=5.9` → `neutral` (off-by-one guard on `≥6`)
  - `h=4.0` → `neutral`; `h=3.9` → unrest branch (off-by-one guard on `≥4`)
  - At `h=3.9`, people-faction, `education=4`: `rollChance` mocked false → `thief`
  - At `h=1.0`, people-faction, `education=5`: `rollChance` mocked false → `protestor`
    (happiness ≤1 survivors fall through to the faction/education chain)

- **AC-7b (gone roll both paths)**:
  - `h≤1`, mock `rollChance` → true → `role=gone`
  - `h≤1`, mock `rollChance` → false → `thief` or `protestor` per faction/education

- **AC-8 (education fork — faction gate fires first)**:
  - people-faction, `h=3, education=4` → `thief`
  - people-faction, `h=3, education=5` → `protestor`
  - army-faction, `h=3, education=7` → `thief` (army ignores education)
  - Boundary: `education=4` vs `education=5` for people-faction, all else equal

- **AC-20 (education flip — the core lever)**:
  - people-faction at `h=3, education=4` → `thief`; raise `education=5` → `protestor`
  - Reverse: lower `education` 5→4 → flips `protestor`→`thief` next round
  - army-faction: `thief` regardless of `education=4` or `education=5`

*Death — AC-9, 10, 11, 22:*

- **AC-9 (gone → dead, permanent)**:
  - Mock gone roll true → `alive=false`; next round ped absent from population (never replaced)

- **AC-10 (starvation eligibility — all 5 cases)**:
  - people-faction, `health=0` → `starvationChance=0.15`
  - displaced army (`employed=false`), `health=0` → `starvationChance=0.15`
  - **employed army**, `health=0` → `starvationChance=0` (employed elite is immune)
  - **employed business**, `health=0` → `starvationChance=0` (immune)
  - people-faction, `health=3` (at threshold) → `starvationChance=0`

- **AC-11 (mutual exclusion)**:
  - Mock gone roll → true; verify starvation `rollChance` called **0 times** for that ped
  - (Mock call count / spy assertion on `rollChance` invocation count)

- **AC-22 (gone+starvation ordering, Edge 3)**:
  - people-faction, `h≤1, health=0` (both eligible)
  - Gone roll mocked true → `alive=false`, starvation not evaluated, ped counted once dead

*Feedback — AC-12, 13, 21, 23:*

- **AC-12 (protest skim + underflow guard)**:
  - `peopleRelation=+5, protestorCount=3` → `+4`; count=6 → `+3`; count=15 → `0`
  - Underflow: `peopleRelation=-8, protestorCount=15` → exactly `-10` (not -13; clamp fires)
  - No-op: `peopleRelation=-10, protestorCount=15` → `-10` (already at floor)

- **AC-13 (thief skim + underflow guard)**:
  - `treasury=100, thiefCount=10` → `80`
  - `treasury=5, thiefCount=4` → `0` (clamp fires: 5 - 8 = -3 → 0)
  - `treasury=0, thiefCount=5` → `0` (no-op)

- **AC-21 (zero-feedback when empty)**:
  - `protestorCount=0, thiefCount=0` → `peopleRelation` unchanged, `treasury` unchanged

- **AC-23 (protest cap at 25 protestors)**:
  - `protestorCount=25, peopleRelation=+5` → subtracts exactly `min(floor(25/3),5)=5`
    → `peopleRelation=0` (not -3, confirming cap applies over the raw `floor(8)`)

*Population — AC-14, 24:*

- **AC-14 (displayedPopulation formula)**:
  - 25 alive → `round(25/25 * 5_924_511) = 5,924,511`
  - 0 alive → `0`
  - 12 alive → `round(12/25 * 5_924_511) = 2,843,765` (mid-range guard)

- **AC-24 (monotonicity — two-round scenario)**:
  - 25 alive, `health=5` (above starvation threshold), gone roll forced true for exactly 1 ped
  - Round 1: `displayedPopulation=5,924,511`; Round 2: `5,687,531` (24 alive) — strictly less

*AC-25 (starvation linearity):*
- `health=1` → `starvationChance = 0.15 * (1 - 1/3) = 0.10`
- `health=2` → `starvationChance = 0.15 * (1 - 2/3) = 0.05`

*nextRound() integration:*
- Call `nextRound()` with a known mock store state containing 25 citizens
- Assert `citizens` slice in returned state has updated `role`, `alive`, `happiness`,
  and `lastFactionRelation` for all peds
- Assert `peopleRelation` and `treasury` reflect feedback deltas in the same atomic set
- Full suite: `npx vitest run` → 0 new failures (pre-existing `secret-room-rework.test.ts`
  suite-isolation failure is a known pre-existing issue; assert it does not worsen)

*Control manifest guards:*
- `CitizenHandler.ts` must not import from `../../Stores/GameState` (pure handler rule)
- Round resolution uses a single atomic `set((s) => ({...}))` — no multiple `set()` calls
- No `any` types in CitizenHandler or citizen data arrays
- **AC-15 CI gate**: `rg 'Math\.random' src/Stores/CitizenHandler.ts` returns 0 matches

**Estimated test count**: ~30 integration tests

## Manual QA Checklist

### Story 7-4: Street View — Citizen Rendering

**Verification method**: Screenshot comparison + lead sign-off
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer (ADR-0003 boundary) + owner (visual read)
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/7-4-street-view-citizens-evidence.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Well-run city (all factions ≥+5, security≥6, infrastructure≥6): street shows spread of
  upright strollers in faction colours (army uniforms, business suits, civilians)
- [ ] Declined city (army rel≤−1, security=2): displaced army peds render civilian clothes
  (outfit precedence chain: uniform dropped when displaced)
- [ ] Unrest state (people happiness ≤3, education≥5): protestor peds cluster together in the
  square; thieves skulk separately at shopfronts — visually distinct groups
- [ ] Thief peds render thief outfit + skulking posture, not faction uniform/suit
- [ ] `ped_special_man_protestor` asset present OR confirmed placeholder — note in sign-off
  which is in use (placeholder is acceptable for this story)
- [ ] Body type (`slim / fit / fat`) tracks health budget — high health → more fit peds;
  low health → more fat peds visible
- [ ] `gone` peds absent — no ghost meshes at their former positions
- [ ] No ADR-0003 violation: StreetView.tsx reads citizen state from Zustand store;
  no gameplay logic inline in the 3D component (grep: no `import from 'three'` in any
  non-3D citizen file)
- [ ] Draw calls stay `< 100` (Chrome DevTools Performance tab)
- [ ] Frame rate ≥ 60 fps with all 25 peds present

---

### Story 7-5: Citizen Inspector UI

**Verification method**: Manual walkthrough doc
**Who must sign off**: owner + lead-programmer
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/7-5-citizen-inspector-evidence.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Click an alive ped → inspector panel opens (< 200ms perceived)
- [ ] Panel shows: `name` (e.g. "Marco Reyes"), `faction` with icon, `employed`/role state
  ("Soldier" or "Demobilized"), `happiness` 0–10 bar, `role` label
- [ ] `gone` peds not clickable — clicking their former position does nothing
- [ ] Click elsewhere → panel dismisses
- [ ] Select a second ped while inspector open → panel swaps to new ped (no double-panel, no stale data)
- [ ] No `import from 'three'` in the inspector panel component (ADR-0003)
- [ ] 3D Scene owns the raycast, emits `selectedPedId` to store — panel reads store only
- [ ] Legible at 1920×1080 and 1280×720

---

### Story 7-6: Population HUD Readout

**Verification method**: Brief manual walkthrough (may be appended to 7-5 evidence file)
**Who must sign off**: owner
**Evidence**: note in `production/qa/evidence/7-5-citizen-inspector-evidence.md` or
  separate `7-6-population-hud-evidence.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] `displayedPopulation` appears in the existing stat area alongside treasury/relations
- [ ] Formatted with thousands separators: `5,924,511` not `5924511`
- [ ] Starts at `5,924,511` at game start (25 alive)
- [ ] Decreases by ~237k after any round in which at least 1 citizen dies
- [ ] Does NOT decrease when 0 citizens die that round (monotonicity)
- [ ] No `import from 'three'` in the HUD component

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off (run after 7-3 is complete):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game: 25 citizens generated; Street View populates with peds
3. Advance a round: citizen roles update (distribution changes with budget inputs)
4. Treasury takes thief skim when `thiefCount > 0` — round log shows delta
5. `peopleRelation` decreases when `protestorCount > 0` — round log shows delta
6. A citizen drops to `happiness ≤ 1` → eventually `gone` → ped disappears from street;
   `displayedPopulation` decrements by ~237k
7. Load a saved game → citizen roster identical (same 25 names/skins/factions)
8. Save / load cycle: citizen states (`role`, `happiness`, `alive`) persist correctly
9. `npx vitest run` passes — 0 new failures

*Run `/smoke-check sprint` after 7-3 implementation before any QA hand-off.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player |
|-------|--------------|--------------|---------------|
| 5-8 | Can a non-developer understand the core loop on Medium, feel political tension, survive ≥5 rounds? | 1 | Non-developer, fresh player |
| 7-4 (optional) | Do citizens communicate game state visually without tooltips? Does the player notice when peds become thieves/protestors? | 1 (developer self-check acceptable) | Developer or fresh observer |

**Sign-off requirement**: 5-8 notes at
`production/playtests/playtest-sprint5-5-8-[date].md`, reviewed by owner before
story 5-8 can be marked COMPLETE.

## Definition of Done — Sprint 7

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] **7-1, 7-2**: test file exists at `tests/unit/citizens/` path above; all tests pass — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] **7-3**: integration test file exists at `tests/integration/citizens/` path above; all tests pass — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] **7-3**: `rg 'Math\.random' src/Stores/CitizenHandler.ts` returns 0 matches — **BLOCKING CI gate**
- [ ] Full suite passes: `npx vitest run` — 0 net regressions vs pre-sprint baseline
- [ ] **7-4, 7-5, 7-6**: manual evidence doc in `production/qa/evidence/` — ADVISORY
- [ ] **5-8**: playtest notes at `production/playtests/playtest-sprint5-5-8-[date].md` with owner sign-off
- [ ] **5-9**: `design/difficulty-curve.md` Hard row populated
- [ ] Smoke check passes after 7-3 — run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` via `/story-done`
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs; treasury / relations / round-resolution behaviour preserved
